normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Wide backhanded slash.
Charged version grants extra hitstun and damage, and Critical Counters on counterhit.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
Crouching kick.
A little less range than {{ n5 }}{{ A }}.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ B }}
normals.description:
A sliding kick.
Technically Vi's longest ranged move, going by travel distance.
It's also the move that puts her lowest to the ground, so you can use it to avoid some projectiles or high-aiming attacks.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ C }}
normals.description: Low needle swipe. Moves forward a little bit.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
Downwards needle slash.
The downwards angle lets you use it as an instant overhead with her hop.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ B }}
normals.description: Forward slash. Has the most horizontal range of Vi's air normals by a little bit.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Spins upside down and slashes.
Has a wide range and hits on both sides, but kinda slow to start.
Charged version has extra damage and hitstun.

commands.name: {{ n3 }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Vi kicks upwards while standing on her hands.
Little horizontal range, but good vertical range.

commands.name: {{ d }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Wide horizontal slash.
Same animation as {{ n5 }}{{ C }}, but hits twice.

throws.name: Ground throw
throws.description:
Hops onto the opponent and kicks off of them.
Can't combo without Active Shift.

throws.name: Air throw
throws.input: {{ d4 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} or {{ d6 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} while airborne
throws.description: Grabs the opponent and izuna drops them.

skills.name: Beeline
skills.description:
Vi readies herself then flies speedily towards the opponent.
When done with a backwards or vertical input, she will move slightly in that direction while readying.
You can do aerial attacks during the dive, and it can be steered to go higher, lower, shorter, or farther depending on your directional input.
You can also press {{ d2 }}{{ d2 }} during startup to fastfall down to the ground.
You can cancel other Skills into Beeline, but it costs 4 SP instead.

skills.name: Beemerang Toss
skills.description:
Vi tosses her Beemerang at the opponent.
You can steer the Beemerang vertically while throwing.
Once it reaches its maximum distance, the Beemerang will spin in place, until you input {{ d236 }}{{ A }} again to call it back.
The recall has no SP cost.
The return speed is much faster than the initial throw speed.

skills.name: {{ n236 }}{{ B }}
skills.description:
Vi slashes at the opponent's feet with both needles while doing a cool flip.
Decently fast startup, but not safe on block.
Critical Counter on counterhit.

skills.name: Blue Stinger
skills.description:
Vi stings the opponent with her stinger. Inflicts Numb if it hits.
Uncharged, it's pretty fast but rather unsafe. It's useful as a high risk, decent reward frametrap.
Charged version is a lot slower but very plus on block. If your opponent's not ready, using this move every so often is a good way to reset pressure. It also crumples a little longer if you need that, I guess.
Only crumples once in a combo. You can use it to restand aerial opponents.

skills.name: Needle Toss
skills.input: {{ d236 }}{{ A }} or {{ d236 }}{{ B }} while airborne
skills.description:
Vi tosses a needle diagonally downwards.
{{ A }} version bounces you backwards, while {{ B }} version makes you fall forwards. {{ B }} version throws the needle at a shallower angle.
Both versions are slightly plus on block when done as low as possible.
The {{ A }} version is more plus, but leaves you further away.

skills.name: Needle Pincer
skills.description:
Vi slashes with a needle while advancing.
An additional slash can be performed with {{ d4 }}{{ A }}, which can lead into one last followup.
Pressing {{ d4 }}{{ A }} again has Vi leap and slash with both needles. It's fast and knocks the opponent far away. In the corner, it gives a wallbounce.
You can also press {{ d4 }}{{ B }}, {{ d4 }}{{ C }}, or {{ d6 }}{{ B }} to go into {{ d214 }}{{ B }}, {{ d214 }}{{ C }}, or {{ d236 }}{{ B }}, respectively.
On counterhit, you can combo into the {{ d4 }}{{ B }} finisher and get a crouching combo afterwards.
The {{ d6 }}{{ B }} finisher is always a low, even when done in the air. However, you have to land first before the slash will come out.

skills.name: {{ n214 }}{{ B }}
skills.description:
Vi hops forwards and slashes downwards with both needles. Has faster startup when doing the aerial version.
Forces crouch on hit.
Counterhit has enough hitstun to link heavy normals, otherwise you have to use a light normal on hit.

skills.name: {{ n214 }}{{ C }}
skills.description:
Vi slashes while retreating. You can dash-cancel, even on block, but dash-canceling on block leaves you slightly minus.
Midscreen, you can cancel {{ d214 }}{{ C }} into a forward airdash and continue to juggle.
Being in the corner also allows you to land multiple {{ d214 }}{{ C }}s in the same combo, which is a very damaging route.

exs.name: Hurricane Toss
exs.description:
Vi throws her boomerang in front of her, spinning it fast enough to create a small hurricane.
Knocks the opponent high into the air, and you can always pick up a combo afterwards.
Also useful in block pressure, since it leaves you at advantage.

exs.name: Poison Pincer
exs.description:
Vi rapidly stabs with needles before ending with a final hit that poisons the opponent.
The last hit doesn't occur if the previous hits are blocked or whiff.
